def: s.f. A great-grand-daughter.
adj. Blooming, blossoming, flowering, blossomed, blown (as a flower), covered with blossoms; expanded like a blown flower; shining; smiling, gay, glad, bright, cheerful, pleased

adj. Having the face expanded with joy, having a cheerful or smiling countenance, cheerful-looking, bright-faced.

s.m. = S پرپهلتا प्रफुल्लता pra-phullatā, s.f. Brightness, cheerfulness, gayness.

part. adj. = pra-phulla, q.v. adj. Blooming, blossoming, flowering, blossomed, blown (as a flower), covered with blossoms; expanded like a blown flower; shining; smiling, gay, glad, bright, cheerful, pleased

adj. Having the face expanded with joy, having a cheerful or smiling countenance, cheerful-looking, bright-faced.

def: part. Caused to attain to, made to arrive at; procured, obtained.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit प्राप्त (prāpta), from प्राप् (prāp, “to reach, attain, obtain”), a compound of प्र- (pra-, prepositional prefix) + आप् (āp, “to reach, obtain”).

def: s.m. A paternal great-grandfather.
s.f. A paternal great-grandmother.
v.t. To attain, reach, get, acquire, obtain.

part. Attained to, reached, arrived at; come upon, lighted upon, met with, found; obtained, got, gained, acquired, procured, won; incurred, contracted; destined, fated, appointed; fitting, proper; suffered, endured, undergone
more: n. m. S. प्राप्त 1. Gain; profit; advantage; avail; income; emolument; profitable possession. 2. Produce; fruit; proceeds; return. prāpt honā , v. n. To be obtained, realized, etc.
1. s. m. ( प्राप्ति from प्र and r. आप Acquire) Gain, profit, income, produce, advantage, benefit. 2. ( प्राप्त ) adj. Acquired, attained, obtained.
subs: (prāpta+artha), adj. & s.m. Having attained one's object, successful; — one whose object is attained; — an object attained, an advantage gained
(prāpta+avasar), adj. Taking or finding occasion, opportune, seasonable
adj. Possessed of understanding, enlightened, instructed, intelligent; regaining or recovering consciousness, becoming conscious (after fainting), recovering
s.m. A time or moment arrived, favourable moment, fit time, proper season; — one whose time is come; — adj. Opportune, seasonable, suitable; fated; destined
v.t. To obtain, acquire, receive; to undergo, endure, submit to, incur
v.n. To be attained, be reached, be met with, to arrive (at); to be obtained be acquired, be realized, be incurred, &c.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit प्राप्त (prāpta), from प्राप् (prāp, “to reach, attain, obtain”), a compound of प्र- (pra-, prepositional prefix) + आप् (āp, “to reach, obtain”).

def: s.f.m. (?), Obtaining, getting, gaining, acquisition; profit, gain, advantage, benefit, avail, success; income, produce, fruit; improvement; reach; ascent, rise.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit प्राप्त (prāpta), from प्राप् (prāp, “to reach, attain, obtain”), a compound of प्र- (pra-, prepositional prefix) + आप् (āp, “to reach, obtain”).

prayer, worship; supplication

subs: (-se, or -kī), To pray (for), beg (of), petition, beseech, sue, solicit, &c.

def: s.m. lit. 'To be asked or begged'; an epithet of the third or Dwāpar age.
part. Solicited, begged, wished for, entreated.
s.m. A barbed missile or dart.
s.m. = pra-sav, q.v. s.m. Bringing forth or bearing young, childbirth, parturition ( = prasūti), labour; offspring, young, progeny, posterity; flower, blossom; fruit

s.m. A lying-in chamber, a lying-in hospital

def: s.m. A building consecrated to a deity or inhabited by a prince, temple; palace.

s.m. Clearness, transparentness, purity; perspicuity; calmness, tranquillity, repose, composure; serenity of disposition, good temper; graciousness, propitiousness, favour, kindness, kind behaviour; a propitiary offering or gift; boon, blessing; food offered to a god; the remnants of food presented to an idol, or left by a spiritual teacher, or by a great personage
more: n. m. 1. Offerings made at a shrine. He! Gaṅgā māī, jo babuā pā jāī, to pāṅch rupaë kā parsād chaṛhāī . E. Wom. O! Ganges mother! if I but find my child again, a votive offering of five rupees to you I'll make! 2. The leavings of a great man or spiritual guide. 3. Kindness; favor ( kirpā ); gift; blessing.
s. m. 1. Viand, victuals, food that has been offered to the deities. 2. Kindness, favour, blessing, gift. 3. Leavings of a great man or spiritual guide.
subs: adj. Enjoying or subsisting on favours, &c.; — a pensioner, &c.

def: s.m. = pra-sād, q.v. s.m. A building consecrated to a deity or inhabited by a prince, temple; palace.
adj. & s.m. Accomplishing, perfecting; decorating, adorning; — one who accomplishes or perfects; an attendant who dresses his master.
s.m. Accomplishing, effecting; dressing, decking, adorning; ornament, decoration, embellishment, dress; a comb.
s.f. A drug (commonly called siddhi); a comb.
part. Accomplished, finished, completed, done; ornamented, decorated.
adj. Shewing favour, treating with kindness; offered to idols.
s.m. Die, dice.
s.f. A small branch, a twig.
s.f. A small branch, a twig.

part. adj. Attached (to), united (to), in contact (with), connected (with); cleaving (to), adhering (to); devoted (to), wrapped up (in, -meṅ); engaged (in), applied (to), used, employed; attained, obtained, gained; continual, constant, eternal, everlasting; — adv. Continually, incessantly, eternally.
s.f. Adherence or attachment (to), adhesion, devotion (to); addiction (to), engagedness.
s.m. = pra-śaman, q.v.
s.m. Tranquillizing, pacifying, calming; the disbursement of wealth; securing; killing, destroying, destruction, slaughter.
s.m. The act of eating, feeding upon, tasting; causing to eat or taste (used in comp., e.g. anna-prāśan, q.v.s.v. ann).

s.m. Adherence, attachment (to), devotion (to); connection, union, association, intercourse, coition, illicit intercourse; connected reasoning or argument; mention; discourse, subject, topic, tenour, incident, the case as stated, treatise, section of a book; contingency, case, event; conjuncture, occasion, opportunity, circumstances, time; introduction, insertion; mention (of parents)
more: n. m. S. प्रसङ्ग from प्र, सङ्ग. union. 1. Association; company; union. 2. Cohabitation; sexual intercourse. Kāyā se kām jāt, gāṅṭhhu se dām jāt, purkhan ko nām jāt, rūp jāt aṅg se, Uttam sab karm jāt, kul ke sab dharm jāt, gurjan kī sharm jāt, madan kī umaṅg se, Jap, tap kī ās jāt, bhagtan kī nivās jāb, Sur-pur kā bās jāt, apnī mat bhaṅg se, Rāh jāt, rīt jāt, prīt jāt, panchan partīt jāt beswā parsaṅg se . Kabit. Manhood wasting, pockets emptying, house name staining, beauty fading, Good works hindl ring, race faith losing, house priest shaming, lust o'erflowing, Worship voiding, saints' grace losing, Heaven outcasting, sense destroying, Way lost, rites lost, wife estranging—all from wh—ing. 3. Discourse ( barnan ); quotation. Mahābhārat meṅ yeh parsaṅg hai . 4. Opportunity (اوسر). ek aṅg parsaṅg . Parallel quotations.
s. m. 1. Association. 2. Mention, discourse, subject of discourse. پرسنگ نه لگنا prasang na lagnā, Not to associate with.

def: adj. Resulting from attachment, derived from close connection; inseparably connected, inherent, innate; pertaining to, belonging to any topic, relevant.

part. adj. Clear, bright, pellucid, limpid, pure; soothed, composed, conciliated, propitiated, pleased, gratified (with, -se), delighted, rejoiced; flourishing; willing; gracious, propitious, kind (to, -par), kindly disposed (towards), favourable, complacent
more: adj. 1. Rejoiced; pleased ( khush ). 2. Gracious; kind. prasann honā , v. a. To acquiesce; to be pleased with; to like. Pān purānā, ghirt nayā, aur kulvantī nār; Yeh tīnoṅ tabhī mileṅ jab prasann hoëṅ Murār . Dohā. Old pan, new ghee , a high born dame to wed, Yours then these three when you're by Krishnā blessed.
adj. 1. Rejoiced, pleased. 2. Gracious, kind. پرسن هونا prasanna honā, To acquiesce. پرسن کرنا prasanna karnā, To be pleased with, to like.
subs: (-ko), To keep (one) pleased, to give satisfaction (to)
(-ko), To give pleasure (to), to please, rejoice; to be pleased with, to like
adj. & s.m. 'Placid-countenanced,' having a pleased or approving countenance, agreeable-looking, looking pleased, smiling
(-se), To be pleased (with), to like; to approve (of), to acquiesce (in).

def: s.f. Brightness, clearness, purity; acquiescence, pleasure, goodwill, favour, kindness, propitiousness, good humour, cheerfulness.
more: n. f. 1. Acquiescence; pleasure. 2. Kindness; favor.

part. adj. To be praised or commended, praiseworthy, laudable, commendable.
adj. & s.m. = praśaṅsak, q.v. adj. & s.m. Praising, commending, eulogizing, &c.; — encomiast, flatterer, &c.

adj. & s.m. Asking, demanding; asker, inquirer, questioner, interrogator.
adj. & s.m. Standing in front, preceding, prior; chief, principal, best; — leader, conductor, chief.

def: s.m. Strewing about, spreading out, scattering, spreading; a bed or couch; a thicket or wood overgrown with grass, a jungle; (in Alg.) an enumeration of all the possible combinations of certain given numbers.
s.m. A flat surface, level, plain; stone, rock; precious stone, gem ( = patthar); a handful or bundle of kuśa grass used at sacrifices; a bunch of flowers; a bed, &c. ( = prastār, q.v.)

def: s.m. Introductory eulogy, introduction, prelude, prologue; beginning, commencement; mentioning, mention; occasion, opportunity, time, season.
s.f. Causing to be praised; causing to mention or to speak of; introduction, commencement, preface, exordium; prologue.
adj. Suggested by previous mention; suited to the occasion, appropriate, well-timed, apropos, opportune, seasonable; occasional.

adj. & s.m. Going to, visiting; going on a march or journey; stable, firm, solid; expanding, spread; — a level expanse; table-land on the top of a mountain; a particular weight and measure of capacity (equal to four kuḍavs or forty-eight double handfuls)
subs: s.m. 'Flowering on the mountain top,' a species of plant, a variety of the tulsī or basil with small leaves.

def: s.m. Going forth, setting out, departure, march, the march of an army or of an assailant; the first stage of a march or journey
more: Mah., n. m. lit . Change of place. The first stage of a march or journey. parasthān karnā , v. n. To change one's residence, or to send one's baggage, shoes, or other article to the first stage of a journey on the propitious day or moment on which the traveller himself cannot begin his journey ( pā-tarāb k .).
s. m. March, departure, going forth, march of an assailant.
subs: v.n. To go forth, go away, change (one's) residence, to set out, depart, march; to send baggage, &c. on the first stage of a journey on some propitious day or moment ( = pā-turāb, q.v.s.v. pā).

def: s.m. Causing to depart, sending away, dismissing, despatching; appointment to an embassy; using, employing.
v.t. To appoint, to establish.
part. Made to depart, sent away, dismissed; sent, despatched.
part. Set forth, set out, departed, gone.
part. Praised, eulogized, panegyrized; proposed, propounded, declared; said, mentioned; ready, prepared; accomplished, done.

part. & s.m. Produced, born; flower; bud, blossom; fruit.
part. & s.m. Procreated, begotten; brought forth, born, produced, grown; bringing forth; — the whites, fluor albus.

see پرسو) s. m. The whites, fluor albus.

def: s.f. A woman who has brought forth a child, a woman recently delivered, a lying-in woman.

or prāt-snān, s.m. Morning bath, morning ablution (esp. as a religious exercise)

def: corr. of pragaṭ, q.v. adj. Evident, clear, manifest, apparent, obvious, visible; unfolded, displayed, open; public, issued out, commonly known, undisguised
subs: v.t. To make evident, make known, to bring to light, divulge, disclose ( = prakāś karnā)
v.n. To become manifest; to appear, &c.

def: adj. = pratyaksh, q.v. s.m. & adv. Perceptible to the eye, in sight, perceptible, visible, sensible, cognizable by any of the organs of sense; clear, distinct, evident, manifest, apparent, tangible, undoubted, express, explicit, actual, real; — presence; perceptibility, distinctness; observation, inspection; — in the sight (of), in the presence (of); with direct personal knowledge, distinctly, clearly
subs: s.m. Ocular or visible proof, the evidence of the senses; an organ or faculty of perception
s.m. Seeing with one's own eyes; an eye-witness

def: s.m. The open hand with the fingers extended; — one of the divisions of the lower regions.
s.m. A shoot, tendril; a plant with tendrils, a creeper, climber; a kind of disease, tetanus, epilepsy.

s.m. Glowing heat, heat, warmth; splendour, brilliancy, glory, majesty, dignity; the possession of rank and power, superiority; ardour, zeal, spirit, vigour, power, efficacy, energy; courage, prowess, valour; magnanimity, generosity, goodness, favour, kindness
more: n. m. 1. Brightness; splendour; glory ( jalāl ); majesty. 2. Kindness; favor; goodness; auspices. partāp se , adv. Under the good graces of; through one's kindness.
s. m. Glory, majesty, the high spirit arising from the possession of rank and power.
subs: adv. Generously; through the kindness or favour (of)
pratāp-vant, adj. Full of splendour, endowed with majesty, majestic, glorious, mighty, powerful; dignified ( = pratāpī).

def: corr. of pratāp, q.v.
adj. Burning; inflicting pain paining; — s.m. A particular nell.
s.m. A species of gigantic Asclepias with white flowers, Calotropis gigantea alba.
adj. Hot, burning; shining splendid; majestic, &c. ( = pratāp-vān
adj. Glorious, potent.
adv. Early in the morning, at daybreak, at dawn ( = prāta)
adj. & s.m. (f. -ikā), Deceiving, deceitful, cheating, imposing upon, insidious, perfidious; — deceiver, cheat, impostor.

s.f. = S پرتارن प्रतारण pra-tāraṇ, s.m. (root तॄ with प्र), Ferrying over or across, carrying over, crossing over; deceiving, cheating, over-reaching; deception, deceit, fraud, trick.
part. Deceived, misled, cheated, imposed upon.
s.f. Fame, celebrity, notoriety; immemorial custom.
adj. First, before.

adj. & adv. (f. -ā), Foremost, first, initial, the first in a series; earliest, most ancient, primary, original; preceding, previous, prior, earlier, former; chief, principal, most excellent, incomparable; (in Arith.) a first product; — in the first place, firstly
more: adj. S. प्रथ to be well known, Pr. paḍhamo . 1. First. 2. Introductory. See اول 1, 4. Pratham Gaur Ganesh chit lāūṅ, Pāchhe tās Rām gun gāuṅ! Rāmāyan. On Gaur Ganesh first let me fix my thoughts intent, Then hymns of praise to Rām be with my worship blent. pratham pursh ; H. an purakh ; A. g/?/āyab , n. m. ( Gram .) The third person.
subs: s.m. The first ( = in European grammars, the third) person of the verb; a termination of the first (or, according to European grammars, third) person
adv. First, at first, firstly, in the first place; previously
s.m. The first or lowest degree of punishment or fine; a capital crime
s.f. The first and best of courses or practices; donation, gift, &c. ( = dān, q.v.)

def: s.m. Greatness, width, breadth.
s.f. = pr̤ithivī, q.v.
adj. Belonging or relating to the first, primary, first, initial, prior, previous; happening or occurring for the first time.
s.f. = S پراتهمکتو प्राथमिकत्व prāthamikatva, s.m. = S پراتهميه प्राथम्य prāthamya, s.m. The being first, priority, precedence.
s.m. = S پراتهمکتا प्राथमिकता prāthamikatā, s.f. = S پراتهميه प्राथम्य prāthamya, s.m. The being first, priority, precedence.
s.m. = S پراتهمکتا प्राथमिकता prāthamikatā, s.f. = S پراتهمکتو प्राथमिकत्व prāthamikatva, s.m. The being first, priority, precedence.
part. Made known, published, openly announced, declared; disclosed, shown, manifested; famed, famous, celebrated, renowned, notorious.
s.f. Celebrity, renown.
s.m. The young of any animal.
prep. or prefix (used in comp. and signifying), Again, against, back again, towards, near, about; according; for, in exchange, in stead; each, every, &c.
more: An inseparable prefix importing reiteration, repetition, reaction, retaliation, opposition, back, again, towards, near to; against, for, in exchange for, instead of, each, every, as prati-vādi a respondent, prati-phal recompense. prati-bhāg , n. m. Share and share; per share; each share.
prep. Again, against, back again, for, in exchange, instead, each.

def: s.f. Statement, form (of accounts, &c.).
adj. Thrusting back, rejecting, repelling; withstanding, opposing, preventing.
adj. & s.m. Opposing; — opponent, adversary; defendant.
s.m. Connection, conjunction; investment, blockade; blocking up, obstacle, hinderance, impediment, interruption.
adj. & s.m. Obstructing, obstructive, hindering, impeding; — opposer, obstructer, &c.; obstacle, impediment, hinderance.
adv. = prati-varsh.
s.m. Neighbourhood.
adj. & s.m. Dwelling near, neighbouring; — a neighbour.

s.f. An image; look, appearance, manifestation; light, splendour; reflected light; a flashing thought, bright idea, brilliant conception; understanding, intelligence, intellect (esp. as opening or expanding); genius, wit, ingenuity; confidence, boldness, audacity, impudence; dignity.
s.m. Division; share, portion; small daily present of fruit, flowers, vegetables, &c.
s.m. Corresponding character or disposition.
s.m. Appearance, look, similitude; appearing or occurring to the mind; illusion.
s.m. Appearing, appearance, look, semblance.
s.f. Answer, reply, rejoinder, defence.
adj. Vying with, rivalling, emulating.
s.f. Emulousness, emulation.
s.m. The becoming bail or surety for any one, surety, suretyship.
adj. & s.m. Formidable, terrible, terrific, horrific, fearful, frightful; dangerous; — anything formidable, fearful, or dangerous; fear, danger.
s.m. Piercing, penetrating; splitting, cleaving, cutting, dividing, separating.
part. Pierced through: separated, divided.
s.m. Surety, security, bail, bondman, sponsor, pledge
n. m. 1. The reflection of an image or figure from a mirror, etc. 2. An image; a picture; statue.
s.m. Reflection, reflected image, mirrored form; a resemblance or counterpart of real forms, shadow, image, picture.
more: s. m. An image or picture; the reflection of an image or figure from a mirror.

def: s.m. Reflection, reflected image, mirrored form; a resemblance or counterpart of real forms, shadow, image, picture.
adj. A wakening; admonishing, instructing.
s.f. A reflected image, shadow; image, statue, picture, bas-relief.
s.f. A reflected image, shadow; image, statue, picture, bas-relief.
s.f. A reflected image, shadow; image, statue, picture, bas-relief.
s.f. The west quarter, the west.
adj. Situated towards the west, western, west.
s.m. Thinking repeatedly, considering, meditating upon.
adj. Situated towards the west, western, west.
s.m. Giving back, returning or restoring (a deposit), restitution, restoration; return, a gift in return; exchange, barter.
part. Given back; given in exchange.
Each country or region.
s.m.f. (?) Reverberated sound, echo; resonance.
s.m.f. (?) = S پرتدهوان प्रतिध्वान prati-dhvān, s.m. Reverberated sound, echo; resonance.
adv. From day to day, day by day, every day, daily; always, continually.
more: Each day, every day, day by day.

def: adv. In every direction, in all directions, from every quarter; everywhere, all around.
s.m. = S پرتگرجنا प्रतिगर्जना prati-garjanā, s.f. Roaring against; answering roar; reverberating, echoing.
s.f. = S پرتگرجن प्रतिगर्जन prati-garjan, s.m. Roaring against; answering roar; reverberating, echoing.
s.m. Warding off a blow, keeping back, repulse; hindrance, opposition, resistance; preventing, prohibiting; reaction; rebound; a return blow.
adj. & s.m. = prati-ghātī, q.v. adj. & s.m. Keeping off, repelling, repulsing; troubling, encroaching, injuring; hostile, opposed to; — a foe, &c.
s.m. Warding off, repulsing; killing, slaughter.
adj. & s.m. Keeping off, repelling, repulsing; troubling, encroaching, injuring; hostile, opposed to; — a foe, &c.

s.m. Receiving, accepting, acceptance, receiving a donation; one who receives, receiver; a gift, present; a proper donation or fit present to a Brāhman at suitable periods; the right of accepting gifts (as the peculiar prerogative of Brāhmans); friendly reception; the reserve of an army; a spitting-pot, spittoon; the sun near the moon's node.
s.m. One who receives or accepts, receiver, accepter.

s.f. Admission, acknowledgement; assent; solemn declaration, agreement, engagement, promise, vow; statement, assertion, affirmation, declaration, allegation; (in logic) a proposition, the assertion to be proved, the first of the five members of a complete syllogism (according to the Nyāya system); (in law) a plaint, complaint, indictment
subs: adj. Making known the pratigyā, q.v.
pratigyā-patrak, s.m. A promissory note, written contract, bond.
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit प्रतिज्ञा (pratijñā). Doublet of پَیج (paij).

def: part. Asserted, propounded, declared, stated, proposed, deposed, alleged; admitted, acknowledged; promised, agreed; agreeable, desirable.
s.m. A door, gate; door-keeper, porter, warder, chamberlain; juggling, trick, disguise; a juggler.
s.m. = prati-hār, q.v. s.m. A door, gate; door-keeper, porter, warder, chamberlain; juggling, trick, disguise; a juggler.
s.f. = S پرتہارتو प्रतिहारत्व prati-hāratva, s.m. The office of door-keeper or chamberlain.
s.m. = S پرتہارتا प्रतिहारता prati-hāratā, s.f. The office of door-keeper or chamberlain.
s.m. Fragrant oleander, Nerium odorum.
part. Struck back, beaten back, repulsed, repelled; opposed, obstructed; averted; fallen, overthrown; disappointed.
s.f. Repulse; recoil, rebound; disappointment.
s.f. Retaliation, revenge.
part. Injured in return or by way of revenge.
s.f. The uvula or soft palate.
s.m. Returning to life, resuscitation.
See pratigyā.
adj. & s.m. Adverse, contrary; inverted, reversed, inverse, contrary to the natural order or condition; — part, portion; limb, member.
s.f. A female rival.
s.m. Rendering back, requital, return, reward, retaliation, retribution, revenge; counteraction, application of an antidote or remedy, obviating, preventing, prevention, remedy.

s.m. = prati-kār, q.v. s.m. Rendering back, requital, return, reward, retaliation, retribution, revenge; counteraction, application of an antidote or remedy, obviating, preventing, prevention, remedy.
adj. & s.m. Administering retribution, retaliation, &c.; — a retaliator, &c.; an amanuensis.
s.m. Retaliation, &c. (see next); dress, decoration, toilet, personal embellishment.
s.m. Requital, retaliation; redress, remedy; counteraction, counterworking; opposing, opposition ( = prati-kār).

s.f. Looking to, looking at, regard, consideration, attention, respect; looking for, waiting for, expectation, hope
adj. = pratīkshī, q.v. adj. Looking (at); looking forward (to); looking out (for), waiting (for), expecting, awaiting.
adv. At every moment, every moment, every instant, momentarily; constantly, continually.
s.m. Looking to, looking at, observing, considering, referring to; respecting, respect or regard (for); expecting, waiting (for).
adj. Looking (at); looking forward (to); looking out (for), waiting (for), expecting, awaiting.

adj. & postpn. Contrary, adverse, opposed, opposite, hostile (to); cross-grained, cross, inverted, reverse, perverse, refractory, ungracious, disagreeable; unworthy; — the opposite or contrary (of, -ke), the reverse (of).
s.f. = S پرتکولتو प्रतिकूलत्व prati-kūlatva, s.m. Adverseness, opposition, hostility; perverseness, contumacy.
s.m. = S پرتکولتا प्रतिकूलता prati-kūlatā, s.f. Adverseness, opposition, hostility; perverseness, contumacy.
s.m. Receiving, taking, obtaining, getting; censure, reviling, abuse.

adj. & s.m. 'Against the hair,' contrary to the natural course or order, reverse, inverted; disagreeable, unpleasant; low, vile, base, depraved; left (not right); — a base-born person; any disagreeable or injurious act
subs: prati-lomaj, s.m. A person born from the adverse mixture of different castes (as of a Kshatriya father and Brāhmanī mother, or of a Vaiśya father and a Kshatriya or Brāhmanī mother, in which case the wife is of a higher caste than the husband).

def: s.f. Image, likeness, resemblance, picture, figure, statue, idol; the part of an elephant's head between the tusks; a metre consisting of twelve syllables.
more: n. f. S. प्रतिमा to imitate. An image; idol.
s. f. Image, statue, picture, likeness.

def: s.m. Counterpart, match; model, pattern; image, picture, &c. ( = prati-mā, q.v.).
adv. Every month, monthly, from month to month, month by month.
adj. Of or pertaining to every month, monthly.
s.f. Corresponding form, the counterpart of any real form, image, resemblance, likeness.
s.f. A species of rat.
s.m. Echo, resonance, reverberation ( = prati-dhvani).
s.m. Substitute, representative, proxy, deputy, vicegerent; a surety; a resemblance of a real form, image, likeness, statue, picture
subs: s.m. The work of a substitute, &c.; embassy
v.n. To act as a substitute, &c.; to take security.

def: s.f. = S پرتندهتو प्रतिनिधित्व prati-nidhitva, s.m. The status or the condition of a substitute, &c.; lieutenancy, ambassadorship.
s.m. = S پرتندهتا प्रतिनिधिता prati-nidhitā, s.f. The status or the condition of a substitute, &c.; lieutenancy, ambassadorship.
adv. Night by night, night after night, every night, nightly, by night.
adj. Against the grain, opposite, adverse, contrary, opposed, contradictory, reverse; inverted, out of order, disordered; resisting, perverse, refractory, disobedient, cross, obstinate.
s.m. = prati-pakshi, q.v. s.m. Rival, opponent, adversary.
s.f. = prati-pat, q.v. s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane (esp. of the former); understanding, intelligence; rank, consequence.
adv. At every step, at each step, step by step; on every occasion, every moment, continually; at every place, everywhere; in every word, at every word.

s.m. Imparting, giving, presenting; donation, gift; appointing, producing, exciting, causing, accomplishing, effecting; enunciating, treating of, discussing, expounding, explaining, teaching, affirming, declaring; ascertaining, establishing, proving, substantiating
s.m. (in Gram.), The crude form of a noun, a noun in its uninflected state.

part. Given, delivered, presented; caused, produced, accomplished, effected; declared, represented, stated, enunciated, asserted, proved, established, maintained, ascertained; explained, expounded, treated of.
part. adj. To be treated of, to be discussed, to be explained or expounded.
s.m. Rival, opponent, adversary.
s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
more: n. m. 1. Protection; support; sustenance; patronage. 2. Cherisher; patron ( murabbī ); protector.
s. m. Patronising, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding, cherishing.

def: adj. & s.m. Protecting, defending, preserving, cherishing; — protector, guardian, benefactor, nourisher, cherisher, patron; a king.
s.m. = prati-pāl, q.v. s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
part. Protected, cherished; practised, followed.

v.t. = prati-pal karnā, q.v.s.v. prati-pāl. s.m. Protecting, guarding, defending, cherishing, patronizing, protection, fostering, rearing, breeding; entertaining; — cherisher, patron, &c. = prati-pālak, q.v.
more: v.a. To preserve, to keep, to cherish.

def: part. Come up to, approached, reached, obtained, gained; done, effected, accomplished; known, understood, ascertained, determined; assented to, agreed to, accepted, admitted.

s.f. The first day of a lunar fortnight, the first day of the moon's increase or wane (esp. of the former); understanding, intelligence; rank, consequence.

s.f. Gaining, getting, obtaining, acquirement, gain; becoming aware of, perception, ascertainment, determination, knowledge; acquirement of rank or dignity, reputation, fame, renown; honouring, worshipping, honour, respectful behaviour.
s.m. Return, reward, recompense, remuneration, requital, retaliation, retribution
subs: s.m. Rewarder, recompenser, avenger, an epithet of the Deity.

def: s.m. Counter-order, countermand, suspension of a general prohibition in a particular case, license for an act which under other circumstances is forbidden.
adj. & s.m. Doing homage, honouring; — one who does homage, a reverer, venerator, adorer, worshipper.
s.m. Doing homage, showing respect, honouring; exchange of civilities, mutual obeisance or reverence.
adv. Man by man. every man, for each man.
s.m. A shore, bank.
s.m. Preserving, preservation, protection.
adv. Each night, every night, nightly.
s.m. Opposition, impediment, obstruction, obstacle, hinderance, stoppage; siege, blockade.
adj. & s.m. Opposing, obstructing, hindering, stopping; besieging; opponent; obstacle; robber, thief.
adj. & s.m. Opposing, obstructing, hindering, stopping; besieging; opponent; obstacle; robber, thief.
s.m. The counterpart of any real form, an image, resemblance, representation, likeness, picture.
s.m. Reverberating sound, reverberation, echo, resonance.
s.f. Fear or anxiety (on account of); constant fear or doubt.

adj. & s.m. Going towards; following, dependent, subject to, servile; — a cord or ribbon worn round the neck or wrist at nuptials, &c. (as an amulet); an ornament, bracelet, wreath, garland; — a follower, servant, dependant; — a form of magic or incantation; — cicatrizing or healing (as a sore).

s.m. Continued creation out of primitive matter; secondary creation, or the creation of the world by the agency of Brahmā and other divinities regarded as the agents of one Supreme Being; dissolution; the portion of a Purāna which treats of the destruction and renovation of the world.
s.m. Keeping or warding off, keeping back (of a disease, &c.); forbidding, prohibition; denial, refusal; negation, contradiction; rejection; exception.
part. Prohibited, forbidden; refused, denied, disallowed; contradicted.
adj. Famous, renowned.

s.f. Standing still, resting, remaining in; resting-place, site, foundation; fixity, constitution, strength; a high or honourable position, dignity, rank, high authority; celebrity, fame, notoriety; installation, inauguration; the consecration of a temple, or a monument or image, in honour of a deity; the setting up of an idol; the endowment of a temple; portioning a daughter; the performance of rights or ceremonies for the completion of a vow; accomplishment, completion; a metre of four lines of four syllables each; a variety of the Gāyatrī metre (consisting of three lines of eight, seven, and six syllables respectively)
more: s. f. 1. Celebrity, renown. 2. Consecration of a monument erected in honour of a deity or of the image of a deity.
subs: v.t. To instal, inaugurate; to set up (an idol); to consecrate (a temple), &c.

def: n. f. 1. Position; rank. 2. See شـﮩرت 3. The consecration or endowment of a temple. 4. The marriage portion of a daughter. 5. ( Pros .) A metre consisting of a stanza of four lines of four syllables each; a variety of Gāyatrī metre consisting of three lines of eight, seven, and six syllables respectively.

s.m. Firm standing; standing place, ground, foundation, base; foot, leg; site, situation; — name of a town at the confluence of the Ganges and Jamna (on the left bank of the Ganges, opposite to Allahabad), the capital of the early kings of the lunar dynasty; name of a town on the Godāvarī, the capital of Sālivāhan.

part. adj. & s.m. Set up, erected; established, nxed, placed, situated; established in life, married; portioned, endowed; consecrated, inaugurated, installed; completed, finished, effected; experienced, conversant with; famous, celebrated, renowned, illustrious, — a celebrated or famous person, &c.
s.f. Emulation, rivalry.
adj. & s.m. Emulous, envious; refractory, rebellious; — a rival.
s.m. One who promises or assents, promiser.
part. & s.m. Promised, assented, agreed, accepted, granted; — a promise, assent; an engagement; an echo.
s.f. = S پرتشيايه प्रतिश्याय prati-śyāya, s.m. A cold, catarrh.
s.m. = prati-śyāyā, q.v.
s.m. = S پرتشيا प्रतिश्या pratiśyā, s.f. A cold, catarrh.
part. Gone away; gone by, past; acknowledged, proved; believed, trusted; experienced, known, well-known, famous, celebrated, renowned; trusting, believing; satisfied, glad, pleased, delighted
more: n. f. S. प्रतीति. Faith; belief; confidence; trust. 1. Tulsī, apno jānke kīnī thī partīt; Dhoko de nyāre bhaë, bhalī nibhāī pīt? Tulsī Dās. Tulsī, your life you trusted as your own held dear, She played you false and fled—such constancy was here! 2. Pāchhe rupaiyā det haiṅ, let tamassuk mīt, Tulsī, kāhū kī nahīṅ ab jāno partīt . Tulsī Dās. Tulsī, your bond your friend first takes before he'll money lend, No one another trusts, of truth and virtue now an end. 3. Apnā aëpan lāë-ke tiryā pūjat bhīt, Suphal hot man kāmnā, Tulsī, pirem partīt . Tulsī Dās. Her votive offering brought the woman claps against the wall, Tulsī, in loving faith her heart's desires accomplished all. 4. Parāī lugaiyā kī, ke partīt? Khā gaī laṛvā, dekhā gaī pīṭ . Prov. You ne'er can trust another's wife, vain hope eschew, She 'll eat up all the cakes and turn her back on you. partīt karnā , v. a. To believe; trust; co…
s. f. Faith. confidence, trust. پرتيت کرنا partīt karnā, 1. To examine. 2. To believe. 3. To trust.
subs: (˚īta+ar˚), adj. Having a recognized or acknowledged meaning.

def: s.m. A particular tune, a kind of air or melody.

s.f. Clear apprehension or insight (into), clear notion (of), distinct conception; complete understanding or ascertainment, knowledge, experience; conviction; faith, belief; trust, credit; fame, notoriety
subs: (or partīt) karnā (-kī), To form a distinct conception (of), to examine; to believe; to trust (in), rely (on), put faith (in), &c.

def: s.m. Answer, reply, rejoinder; an echo.
s.m. = S پرتواکيه प्रतिवाक्य prati-vākya, s.m. = S پرتوان प्रतिवाणि prati-vāṇi, s.f. = prati-vāć q.v.
s.m. Answer, reply, rejoinder; altercation, quarrel.
adj. & s.m. = prati-bādhī, q.v. adj. & s.m. Opposing; — opponent, adversary; defendant.

adj. & s.m. Answering, replying, rejoining, responding; contradicting; disobedient, contending against, refractory; calumniating, slandering; — an opponent (in controversy, &c.); defendant, respondent.
s.f. The state or situation of a respondent or defendant at law.
s.m. = S پرتوان प्रतिवाणि prati-vāṇi, s.f. = S پرتوچن प्रतिवचन prati-vaćan, s.m. = prati-vāć q.v.
s.f. = S پرتواکيه प्रतिवाक्य prati-vākya, s.m. = S پرتوچن प्रतिवचन prati-vaćan, s.m. = prati-vāć q.v.
